reference: Hi, I was carrying a box through a doorway when I misjudged and hit the door frame really hard, causing a big bruise where the box impacted my left hip. A couple of weeks later, a lump the size of a large pea has appeared where the bruise was. Is this anything to worry about?
text: Hire, I was carrying a box through a doorway when I misjudged and hit the doorframe really hard, causing a big bruise where the box impacted my left hip. A couple of weeks later, a lump the size of a large pea has appeared where the bruise was. Is this anything to worry about?
